title: Minecraft Symbols: Copy & Paste Chat & Server Name Characters
meta_description: Copy Minecraft symbols for chat, MOTDs, and server names — arrows, block shading ░▒▓, box-drawing lines, and game-style icons. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Chat brackets, MOTD shading blocks, box-drawing lines, and game-themed icons that render in Minecraft's font. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Minecraft's default font renders a wide slice of Unicode, which is why servers decorate MOTDs, chat ranks, holograms, and kick screens with characters like ►, ▌, and ☠. This library collects the Minecraft symbols that show up reliably in chat, server list entries, scoreboard lines, and plugin configs — from shading blocks for MOTD banners to pickaxe and sword icons for rank prefixes. Paste them into server.properties-driven MOTD plugins, essentials chat formats, or anvil-renamed items.

sections.label: Rank Brackets
sections.intro: Arrowheads and ornament brackets used around [Admin]-style rank tags and chat prefixes.

sections.label: MOTD Blocks
sections.intro: Solid and shaded block elements for MOTD banners, progress bars, and pixel-style dividers.

sections.label: Line Drawing
sections.intro: Line and corner pieces for framing /help menus, hologram panels, and scoreboard borders.

cta: Use UltraTextGen to convert plain text into bold, italic, cursive, and 100+ other Unicode font styles — free and instant.
